title: sustrepho #4962
definition:
1) to twist together, roll together
 2) to collect, combine, unite
    2a) of men, to (gather themselves together) assemble
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to twist together, roll together
 2) to collect, combine, unite
    2a) of men, to (gather themselves together) assemble

    NASB:  to twist together, hence to gather together (pass.):
